nasb.text: Elijah was a man with a nature like ours, and he prayed earnestly that it would not rain, and it did not rain on the earth for three years and six months.

esv.text: Elijah was a man with a nature like ours, and he prayed fervently that it might not rain, and for three years and six months it did not rain on the earth.

cnv.text: 以利亞是與我們性情相同的人；他懇切祈求不要下雨，地上就三年零六個月沒有雨；

ccb.text: 以利亚先知和我们一样同是血肉之躯，他恳切地祈求不要下雨，结果三年半没有下雨。

csbs.text: 以利亚和我们同样是人，但他用祷告来祈求不要降雨，果然地上三年零六个月没有降雨。
